compiled_state.title: As a fix-bug agent, I use RED/GREEN/UPDATE testing model so I only write new tests when coverage gaps exist
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update the fix-bug skill to integrate the RED/GREEN/UPDATE testing model. Fix-bug defaults to GREEN or UPDATE (most bug fixes change implementation, not behavior); RED is the exception for coverage gaps. Hypothesis validation tests are allowed but must be marked as scaffolding for later removal.
**Why**: Currently fix-bug always dispatches RED test writing, even when the bug fix does not change behavior and existing tests already cover the affected code paths.
**Scope**:
- IN: Fix-bug consumes the shared behavioral testing standard
- IN: Fix-bug defaults to GREEN or UPDATE testing mode
- IN: RED mode used only when investigation reveals a coverage gap
- IN: Hypothesis validation tests marked as scaffolding with explicit removal instructions
- OUT: Modifying the RED test writer agent (separate story)
- OUT: Modifying the shared testing standard itself (separate story)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, fix-bug integrates the RED/GREEN/UPDATE testing model: defaults to GREEN or UPDATE; RED is the exception for coverage gaps
  ← Satisfies: "Fix-bug integrates the RED/GREEN/UPDATE testing model: defaults to GREEN or UPDATE; RED is the exception for coverage gaps"
- When this story is complete, hypothesis validation tests are allowed but marked as scaffolding for later removal
  ← Satisfies: "Hypothesis validation tests are allowed but must be marked as scaffolding for later removal"
- When this story is complete, fix-bug consumes the shared behavioral testing standard
  ← Satisfies: "All test-writing agent prompts consume a shared behavioral testing standard"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
  ← Satisfies: TDD done-of-done

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Consideration: [Reliability] Hypothesis validation tests marked as scaffolding must be clarified: whether they register in .test-index with RED markers, and how scaffolding removal interacts with the test gate and epic closure (which blocks on remaining [marker] entries).
comments.author: Test
